Finance.description: Financial calculations, consolidation logic, and custom calc routines

entryPoint.cs: public object Main(SessionInfo si, BRGlobals globals, FinanceRulesApi api, FinanceRulesArgs args)

argsProperties.FunctionType: FinanceFunctionType enum - determines which function to execute
argsProperties.CustomCalculateName: Name of custom calculate when FunctionType is CustomCalculate
argsProperties.MemberListName: Name of member list when FunctionType is CustomMemberList

apiProperties.Pov: Current Point of View (Entity, Account, Time, Scenario, etc.)

Extender.description: Data management, validation, and business process automation

entryPoint.cs: public object Main(SessionInfo si, BRGlobals globals, object api, ExtenderArgs args)

argsProperties.FunctionName: String identifying the function to execute (custom per rule)
argsProperties.NameValuePairs: Dictionary<string,string> of parameters passed to the rule
argsProperties.Api: Object reference to the calling API
